mapper.select: SELECT id, class_name, class_code, grade_level, department_id, teacher_id, assistant_teacher_id, student_count, classroom_location, enrollment_year, graduation_year, class_type, status, created_at, updated_at FROM classes WHERE class_code = #{classCode} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT c.id, c.class_name, c.class_code, c.grade_level, c.grade_id, c.department_id, d.dept_name as department_name, c.major_id, m.major_name as major_name, c.major_direction_id, md.direction_name as major_direction_name, CONCAT(c.enrollment_year, '级') as grade, c.teacher_id, t.real_name as teacher_name, c.assistant_teacher_id, at.real_name as assistant_teacher_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students s WHERE s.class_id = c.id AND s.deleted = 0) as student_count, 50 as max_students, c.classroom_location, c.enrollment_year, c.graduation_year, c.class_type, CASE c.class_type WHEN 1 THEN '普通班' WHEN 2 THEN '重点班' WHEN 3 THEN '实验班' ELSE '未知' END as class_type_name, c.status, CASE c.status WHEN 1 THEN '启用' WHEN 0 THEN '禁用' ELSE '未知' END as status_name, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM classes c LEFT JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN majors m ON c.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN major_directions md ON c.major_direction_id = md.id LEFT JOIN users t ON c.teacher_id = t.id LEFT JOIN users at ON c.assistant_teacher_id = at.id WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND c.department_id = #{departmentId} AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.grade_level ASC, c.class_name ASC

SELECT c.id, c.class_name, c.class_code, c.grade_level, c.grade_id, c.department_id, d.dept_name as department_name, c.major_id, m.major_name as major_name, c.major_direction_id, md.direction_name as major_direction_name, CONCAT(c.enrollment_year, '级') as grade, c.teacher_id, t.real_name as teacher_name, c.assistant_teacher_id, at.real_name as assistant_teacher_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students s WHERE s.class_id = c.id AND s.deleted = 0) as student_count, 50 as max_students, c.classroom_location, c.enrollment_year, c.graduation_year, c.class_type, CASE c.class_type WHEN 1 THEN '普通班' WHEN 2 THEN '重点班' WHEN 3 THEN '实验班' ELSE '未知' END as class_type_name, c.status, CASE c.status WHEN 1 THEN '启用' WHEN 0 THEN '禁用' ELSE '未知' END as status_name, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM classes c LEFT JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN majors m ON c.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN major_directions md ON c.major_direction_id = md.id LEFT JOIN users t ON c.teacher_id = t.id LEFT JOIN users at ON c.assistant_teacher_id = at.id WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND (c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} OR c.assistant_teacher_id = #{teacherId}) ORDER BY c.grade_level ASC, c.class_name ASC

SELECT c.id, c.class_name, c.class_code, c.grade_level, c.grade_id, c.department_id, d.dept_name as department_name, c.major_id, m.major_name as major_name, c.major_direction_id, md.direction_name as major_direction_name, CONCAT(c.enrollment_year, '级') as grade, c.teacher_id, t.real_name as teacher_name, c.assistant_teacher_id, at.real_name as assistant_teacher_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students s WHERE s.class_id = c.id AND s.deleted = 0) as student_count, 50 as max_students, c.classroom_location, c.enrollment_year, c.graduation_year, c.class_type, CASE c.class_type WHEN 1 THEN '普通班' WHEN 2 THEN '重点班' WHEN 3 THEN '实验班' ELSE '未知' END as class_type_name, c.status, CASE c.status WHEN 1 THEN '启用' WHEN 0 THEN '禁用' ELSE '未知' END as status_name, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM classes c LEFT JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN majors m ON c.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN major_directions md ON c.major_direction_id = md.id LEFT JOIN users t ON c.teacher_id = t.id LEFT JOIN users at ON c.assistant_teacher_id = at.id WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND c.grade_level = #{gradeLevel} AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.class_name ASC

SELECT c.id, c.class_name, c.class_code, c.grade_level, c.grade_id, c.department_id, d.dept_name as department_name, c.major_id, m.major_name as major_name, c.major_direction_id, md.direction_name as major_direction_name, CONCAT(c.enrollment_year, '级') as grade, c.teacher_id, t.real_name as teacher_name, c.assistant_teacher_id, at.real_name as assistant_teacher_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students s WHERE s.class_id = c.id AND s.deleted = 0) as student_count, 50 as max_students, c.classroom_location, c.enrollment_year, c.graduation_year, c.class_type, CASE c.class_type WHEN 1 THEN '普通班' WHEN 2 THEN '重点班' WHEN 3 THEN '实验班' ELSE '未知' END as class_type_name, c.status, CASE c.status WHEN 1 THEN '启用' WHEN 0 THEN '禁用' ELSE '未知' END as status_name, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM classes c LEFT JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN majors m ON c.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN major_directions md ON c.major_direction_id = md.id LEFT JOIN users t ON c.teacher_id = t.id LEFT JOIN users at ON c.assistant_teacher_id = at.id WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND c.enrollment_year = #{enrollmentYear} AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.class_name ASC

SELECT c.id, c.class_name, c.class_code, c.grade_level, c.grade_id, c.department_id, d.dept_name as department_name, c.major_id, m.major_name as major_name, c.major_direction_id, md.direction_name as major_direction_name, CONCAT(c.enrollment_year, '级') as grade, c.teacher_id, t.real_name as teacher_name, c.assistant_teacher_id, at.real_name as assistant_teacher_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students s WHERE s.class_id = c.id AND s.deleted = 0) as student_count, 50 as max_students, c.classroom_location, c.enrollment_year, c.graduation_year, c.class_type, CASE c.class_type WHEN 1 THEN '普通班' WHEN 2 THEN '重点班' WHEN 3 THEN '实验班' ELSE '未知' END as class_type_name, c.status, CASE c.status WHEN 1 THEN '启用' WHEN 0 THEN '禁用' ELSE '未知' END as status_name, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM classes c LEFT JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN majors m ON c.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN major_directions md ON c.major_direction_id = md.id LEFT JOIN users t ON c.teacher_id = t.id LEFT JOIN users at ON c.assistant_teacher_id = at.id WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.grade_level ASC, c.class_name ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE classes SET student_count = #{studentCount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{classId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM classes c INNER JOIN grades g ON c.grade_level = g.grade_level AND c.enrollment_year = g.enrollment_year WHERE g.id = #{gradeId} AND c.major_id = #{majorId} AND c.deleted = 0 AND g.deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM classes WHERE major_id = #{majorId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) as classCount, COALESCE(SUM(c.student_count), 0) as studentCount FROM classes c INNER JOIN grades g ON c.grade_level = g.grade_level AND c.enrollment_year = g.enrollment_year WHERE g.id = #{gradeId} AND c.major_id = #{majorId} AND c.deleted = 0 AND g.deleted = 0

SELECT c.id, c.class_name, c.class_code, c.grade_level, c.grade_id, c.department_id, d.dept_name as department_name, c.major_id, m.major_name as major_name, c.major_direction_id, md.direction_name as major_direction_name, CONCAT(c.enrollment_year, '级') as grade, c.teacher_id, t.real_name as teacher_name, c.assistant_teacher_id, at.real_name as assistant_teacher_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students s WHERE s.class_id = c.id AND s.deleted = 0) as student_count, 50 as max_students, c.classroom_location, c.enrollment_year, c.graduation_year, c.class_type, CASE c.class_type WHEN 1 THEN '普通班' WHEN 2 THEN '重点班' WHEN 3 THEN '实验班' ELSE '未知' END as class_type_name, c.status, CASE c.status WHEN 1 THEN '启用' WHEN 0 THEN '禁用' ELSE '未知' END as status_name, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM classes c LEFT JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN majors m ON c.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN major_directions md ON c.major_direction_id = md.id LEFT JOIN users t ON c.teacher_id = t.id LEFT JOIN users at ON c.assistant_teacher_id = at.id WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.deleted = 0

SELECT c.id, c.class_name, c.class_code, c.grade_level, c.grade_id, c.department_id, d.dept_name as department_name, c.major_id, m.major_name as major_name, c.major_direction_id, md.direction_name as major_direction_name, CONCAT(c.enrollment_year, '级') as grade, c.teacher_id, t.real_name as teacher_name, c.assistant_teacher_id, at.real_name as assistant_teacher_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students s WHERE s.class_id = c.id AND s.deleted = 0) as student_count, 50 as max_students, c.classroom_location, c.enrollment_year, c.graduation_year, c.class_type, CASE c.class_type WHEN 1 THEN '普通班' WHEN 2 THEN '重点班' WHEN 3 THEN '实验班' ELSE '未知' END as class_type_name, c.status, CASE c.status WHEN 1 THEN '启用' WHEN 0 THEN '禁用' ELSE '未知' END as status_name, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM classes c LEFT JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN majors m ON c.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN major_directions md ON c.major_direction_id = md.id LEFT JOIN users t ON c.teacher_id = t.id LEFT JOIN users at ON c.assistant_teacher_id = at.id WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND c.id IN #{id} ORDER BY c.enrollment_year DESC, c.department_id ASC, c.class_name ASC
SELECT id FROM classes WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND department_id IN #{deptId}
SELECT id FROM classes WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND grade_id IN #{gradeId}
SELECT id FROM classes WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND (teacher_id = #{userId} OR assistant_teacher_id = #{userId})
SELECT DISTINCT grade_id FROM classes WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND grade_id IS NOT NULL AND (teacher_id = #{userId} OR assistant_teacher_id = #{userId})
